title: Instruction and basic block CLI preview
purpose: Expose the native CFG output in a bounded, scriptable preview so users can inspect low-level evidence without leaving the terminal.
actions: List basic blocks and instructions when available
Emit skipped/unavailable message for quick profile

criteria: Command handles quick profile skipped CFG gracefully
Instruction rows include VA, mnemonic/text, block ref, and object ref where available
Tests cover available and unavailable CFG states
